prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-8INPOCKETKNIFE-CLW Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Lock Back Eagle Folding Pocket Knife, 8 Inch Decorative Collector Knives for Camping Description: Be prepared while exploring out in the wilderness in style with the ASR Outdoor Eagle Head Collectible Folding Pocket Knife

This pocket knife features a patriotic bald eagle design with a majestic picture of an eagle on the handle. The blade is constructed of durable steel, and is 3" in length. The knife unfolds to an overall length of 8", and folds to a length of just 5", making it a perfect size for in a jean pocket, small bag, or backpack when not in use.

The handle features a comfortable ergonomic design, and the pocket knife comes with a decorative box with an eagle on the outside so you can display it when not in use. This is a must-have pocket knife for hunters, campers, knife collectors, and patriots alike. Search Terms: rebel flag stuff native american bald eagle Indian collectible gift collector set pocket hunting knives folding clip point blade for dad outdoorsman under 10 soaring wilderness birds knife Features: - DECORATIVE EAGLE KNIFE - Bald eagle pocket knife theme for collectors, featuring a vivid design with a majestic eagle on the handle; Eagle head pommel - POCKET KNIFE SIZE - Unfolds to 8 inches; 5 inches folded; 3 inch blade; Ideal for every day use or decorative display knife - STURDY CONSTRUCTION - Made of durable 440 steel that won't rust; Perfect for hunting and camping - BACK LOCK - Simple Back Lock Mechanism is Easy to Open; Added Safety When Not in Use - GIFT FOR KNIFE COLLECTORS - Unique Eagle-themed Knife is Perfect for Knife Collectors and Enthusiasts | Great for Displaying === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8 Inch Eagle Folding Pocket Knife
